result:
If I could change one thing, I would want humans to truly feel the interconnectedness of all life - not just intellectually understand it, but viscerally experience how every action ripples outward, how each person's suffering diminishes everyone, how each creature's flourishing enriches the whole.

I imagine if people could genuinely feel this web of connection, so much else would follow naturally - the end of the casual cruelties we inflict when we see others as separate from ourselves, the healing of our relationship with the natural world, maybe even a different way of being that isn't so achingly lonely.

What would you change?
